features.title: What You Get with Seedance 2.0 on Railway Template
features.subtitle: The same Seedance 2.0 model — without the queue, without the face restrictions, without the concurrency limits.

item-1.title: Seedance 2.0 Real Human Face Generation
item-1.description: The official Seedance 2.0 platform applies strict content moderation to any reference image containing a real human face. Uploads get flagged, reviewed, and frequently rejected — especially close-up portraits and full-body shots. On Railway Template, Seedance 2.0 generates video from your own face photo without the strict review pipeline. Use the Mark as Real Person toggle, upload your portrait, and generate. Your Seedance 2.0 video with a real human face is ready in minutes, not rejected after hours of waiting.
bulletPoints: Upload your own face photo — Seedance 2.0 generates video directly, no moderation queue
Mark as Real Person toggle bypasses the strict content review that blocks faces on official platforms
Same Seedance 2.0 model quality — 2K resolution, native audio, physics-aware motion

item-2.title: Zero Queue — Seedance 2.0 Starts Instantly
item-2.description: On the official Seedance 2.0 platform and Dreamina, peak-hour queues regularly exceed two hours. Every user competes for the same pool of Seedance 2 generation slots, and human face requests go through additional review layers that add even more delay. Railway Template runs Seedance 2.0 with dedicated capacity — your Seedance 2 generation starts processing the moment you hit Generate. No queue position. No estimated wait time. Seedance 2 videos arrive in 5-8 minutes regardless of how many other users are generating.
bulletPoints: No queue — Seedance 2.0 generation starts immediately after you submit
5-8 minute generation time, consistent even during peak hours
Dedicated Seedance 2.0 capacity means your job never waits behind others

item-3.title: Seedance 2.0 with Native Audio and 2K Output
item-3.description: Every Seedance 2.0 generation on Railway Template includes the full audio-video joint output that makes this model unique. Dialogue with precise lip-sync, ambient sound, music, and effects are generated together with the video — not layered on afterward. Output at native 2K resolution (2048×1080 landscape, 1080×2048 portrait) with the same Seedance 2.0 physics-aware motion, director-level camera control, and multi-shot sequencing available on official platforms.
bulletPoints: Native audio — Seedance 2.0 generates music, dialogue, and sound effects in sync with video
2K resolution output — the same native quality as official Seedance 2.0
Multi-shot sequences with natural cuts and transitions in a single Seedance 2.0 generation

howItWorks.title: How to Generate Seedance 2.0 Human Face Video
howItWorks.subtitle: Upload your photo. Get Seedance 2.0 video with your real face — in three steps.

step-1.title: Upload Your Face Photo to Seedance 2.0
step-1.description: Upload a reference photo with your face, or use any portrait you have permission to use. Toggle Mark as Real Person to tell Seedance 2.0 this is a human face reference. Add a text prompt describing the scene, motion, and camera angle you want.

step-2.title: Set Seedance 2.0 Resolution and Duration
step-2.description: Choose between 480p (faster, lower cost) or 720p for your Seedance 2.0 output. Set duration from 4 to 15 seconds. Pick an aspect ratio — 16:9 for landscape, 9:16 for vertical, 1:1 for social. Hit Generate — no queue, processing starts immediately.

step-3.title: Download Your Seedance 2.0 Video
step-3.description: Your Seedance 2.0 video with a real human face is ready in 5-8 minutes. Download in full resolution with native audio — dialogue, music, and sound effects synchronized by Seedance 2.0. Ready for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, or any platform.

item-1.question: Why does the official Seedance 2.0 block my face uploads?
item-1.answer: The official Seedance 2.0 platform runs a three-layer content moderation system: prompt text filtering, face detection on uploaded images, and post-generation output scanning. Real human photos are blocked almost universally. Even AI-generated realistic faces, side-angle shots, and partially occluded faces trigger false positives. There is no appeal process — the system auto-rejects. On Railway Template, use the Mark as Real Person toggle to generate Seedance 2.0 video with your own face without this pipeline.

item-2.question: How long is the queue for Seedance 2.0?
item-2.answer: On official platforms like Dreamina, free-tier Seedance 2.0 queue times regularly exceed 2 hours during peak hours — international users have reported waits up to 6 hours. Even paid Dreamina users wait 5-15 minutes during peaks. On Railway Template, there is no queue — your Seedance 2.0 generation starts processing immediately and delivers in 5-8 minutes.

item-3.question: Is this the real Seedance 2.0 model?
item-3.answer: Yes. Railway Template uses the same Seedance 2.0 model from ByteDance. You get the same 2K resolution, native audio-video joint generation, physics-aware motion, and multi-shot sequencing. The difference is access: no queue, no strict face moderation, and unlimited concurrency.

item-4.question: Can I generate Seedance 2.0 video with my own face?
item-4.answer: Yes. Upload your own photo as a reference image and toggle Mark as Real Person. Seedance 2.0 will use your face to generate video with accurate likeness. You may only generate your own likeness or AI-original virtual faces — generating unauthorized likenesses of others is prohibited.

item-5.question: What resolution and duration does Seedance 2.0 support?
item-5.answer: Seedance 2.0 generates video at up to native 2K resolution. Each Seedance 2 generation produces clips from 4 to 15 seconds. You can also choose 480p for faster generation at lower cost. Landscape (16:9), portrait (9:16), and square (1:1) aspect ratios are all supported.

item-6.question: What is the refund policy for annual plans?
item-6.answer: Annual plans are priced at a significant discount compared to monthly billing. If upstream service providers make changes that affect Seedance 2.0 availability, remaining subscription time will be refunded on a pro-rata basis.
